title: GoalOS Capability Compounding Lab
thesis: Accepted proof becomes reusable capability. Reusable capability makes the next mission cheaper, safer, faster, and more verifiable.
publicSiteRule: No forms · no inputs · no uploads · no cookies · no analytics · no wallets · no payments · no personal or confidential data.
claimBoundary: Synthetic browser-local public demonstration. No external audit, production certification, value movement, activated settlement, staking activation, empirical SOTA, or AGI/ASI attainment is claimed.

scenarios.name: AI research acceptance
scenarios.mission: Convert an AI research output into a bounded Evidence Docket and review-ready decision state.

scenarios.name: Software delivery review
scenarios.mission: Convert an AI-assisted implementation milestone into criteria-mapped evidence and a signed demo receipt.

scenarios.name: Defensive readiness packet
scenarios.mission: Convert a defensive, repo-owned security review into a public-safe proof packet and capability archive.

scenarios.name: Policy option proof
scenarios.mission: Convert competing policy options into a claims matrix, contradiction ledger, and governed decision state.

cycles.name: First governed decision
cycles.stage: Mission contract → Evidence Docket → Selection Gate

cycles.name: Reuse the proof pattern
cycles.stage: Prior capability → Faster docket assembly → Lower proof debt

cycles.name: Harder mission with memory
cycles.stage: Chronicle memory → Capability package → Harder mission
